mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEETING_MINUTES( MINUTE_SEQ, TITLE, MEETING_DT, START_TIME, END_TIME, DECISIONS, TODOS, USERS_ID, HOST_USERS_ID, CREATED_AT, MAIN_CONTENT ) VALUES ( MINUTE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{meeting_dt}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{decisions, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{todos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{users_id}, #{host_users_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{main_content, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MINUTE_SEQ, m.TITLE, m.MEETING_DT, m.START_TIME, m.END_TIME, m.MAIN_CONTENT, m.DECISIONS, m.TODOS, m.USERS_ID, m.CREATED_AT, m.HOST_USERS_ID, a.ATTENDEE_SEQ, a.USERS_ID AS ATTENDEE_USER_ID, u.NAME AS ATTENDEE_NAME, u.SYSNAME AS ATTENDEE_SYSNAME FROM MEETING_MINUTES m LEFT JOIN MINUTES_ATTENDEES a ON m.MINUTE_SEQ = a.MINUTE_SEQ LEFT JOIN USERS u ON a.USERS_ID = u.ID ORDER BY m.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT m.MINUTE_SEQ, m.TITLE, m.MEETING_DT, m.START_TIME, m.END_TIME, m.MAIN_CONTENT, m.DECISIONS, m.TODOS, m.USERS_ID, m.CREATED_AT, m.HOST_USERS_ID, a.ATTENDEE_SEQ, a.USERS_ID AS ATTENDEE_USER_ID, u.NAME AS ATTENDEE_NAME, u.SYSNAME AS ATTENDEE_SYSNAME FROM MEETING_MINUTES m LEFT JOIN MINUTES_ATTENDEES a ON m.MINUTE_SEQ = a.MINUTE_SEQ LEFT JOIN USERS u ON a.USERS_ID = u.ID WHERE m.MINUTE_SEQ = #{minute_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEETING_MINUTES SET TITLE = #{title}, MEETING_DT = #{meeting_dt}, START_TIME = #{start_time}, END_TIME = #{end_time}, DECISIONS = #{decisions, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOST_USERS_ID = #{host_users_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TODOS = #{todos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAIN_CONTENT = #{main_content, jdbcType=CLOB} WHERE MINUTE_SEQ = #{minute_seq}
